title: Codex 2026 Prompting and Repository Practice · Failure Case: Codex Plan Interview
summary: Apply current Codex guidance across CLI, IDE, app, planning, and repository instructions. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt codex plan interview increment in a Codex-specific prompt and AGENTS.md package. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use Plan mode or an interview when requirements are fuzzy or choices are consequential.
Use goal, context, constraints, and done conditions for material coding work.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
